title: equisetum ramosissimum var. humile
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. humile, also known as dwarf scouring rush, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Equisetaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum var. humile include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Equisetum ramosissimum var. humile can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements.
